blanket_user_consent.title: All transmitted users consented to ad personalization and information sharing with Google Ads
blanket_user_consent.description: Causes this connection to send signals to Google Ads indicating that every transmitted user has accepted ad personalization and data sharing policies. This will cause the user to be included in more advertising functions

custom_reports.title: Custom reports
custom_reports.description: One report per line. Format is a report name:ads object:field list. e.g. myReport:ad_groups:campaign.id
